title: Hiring Real Estate Agent at DLF

jsonLd.title: Hiring Real Estate Agent at DLF
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
